parameters.content:
## 📡 New RSS Articles to Telegram

Monitors an RSS feed every 30 minutes.
When new articles are found, sends the latest ones to a Telegram chat.

**Flow:** RSS Feed Trigger → Limit → Send a text message

**To customize:**
- Change the feed URL in the RSS Feed Trigger node
- Change the max articles per run in the Limit node
- Change the Chat ID in the Telegram node

## 📡 RSS Feed Trigger

**What it does:**
Polls the RSS feed every 30 minutes and fires only for articles it hasn't seen before (automatic deduplication).

**Currently watching:**
`openai.com/news/rss.xml`

**To change the source:**
Replace the Feed URL with any valid RSS/Atom feed URL.

## 🔢 Limit

**What it does:**
Caps the number of articles sent per trigger run to avoid flooding the Telegram chat.

**Currently set to:** 5 articles max per run.

**Tip:** Lower this to 1–2 if the feed publishes many articles at once.

## ✈️ Send a text message

**What it does:**
Formats each article as a Markdown message and sends it to a Telegram chat via bot.

**Message includes:**
- Article title (bold)
- 200-char content preview
- Clickable "Read more" link
- Publication date

**Parse Mode must be set to Markdown** for formatting to render correctly.
